steps.prompt: These letters all start the same way — with a round curve going anti-clockwise. Find c and trace it — start at the top and go round!
steps.feedback: c! That curving stroke is the key.

steps.prompt: Find o — all the way round!

steps.feedback: a! Round first, then the straight bit down.
steps.prompt: Find a — it starts just like c!

steps.feedback: d! Same round start, but the line goes up high.
steps.prompt: Find d — round first, then tall!

steps.feedback: g! Round like the others, then the tail dips below. You mastered the round letters!
